2606.08532.title: DN-Hypo-Pipeline: An AI-Driven Workflow for Hypothesis Generation via Large Language Models and Scientific Explanations
2606.08532.paper_summary: A scientific hypothesis is the first step in research and undergoes experimental validation, yet it also reflects a deep understanding of and reasoning about scientific phenomena. We introduce DN-Hypo-Pipeline, an AI-powered workflow based on large language models, designed to support structured scientific thinking and hypothesis generation by leveraging scientific explanations as prior knowledge. This pipeline assists researchers in deriving novel hypotheses from existing literature. Given the explanandum (i.e., the conclusion) of a research paper, it identifies underlying laws, theories, and principles, and reconstructs a new, yet-to-be-verified explanation for the observed phenomenon. We evaluated DN-Hypo-Pipeline in the field of data science modeling using three highly cited papers. Statistical inference, supported by both LLM-as-judge assessment and human expert evaluation, demonstrates that our pipeline is more effective than direct generation methods. Additionally, we validated the two highest-scoring generated hypotheses by developing corresponding novel algorithms, which outperformed the baseline models presented in the original papers. Beyond application in data science, DN-Hypo-Pipeline provides a theoretical framework that not only encompasses theory-guided data science modeling methods but also reveals a more fundamental structure of the modeling process. Moreover, this approach is essentially a generalization of theory-guided modeling, offering potential for extension to other domains and across a broader range of scientific disciplines.
2606.08532.paper_summary_zh: 科學假設是研究的第一步，並經歷實驗驗證，但它也反映了對科學現象的深刻理解和推理。我們介紹了 DN-Hypo-Pipeline，這是一個基於大型語言模型的 AI 驅動工作流程，旨在通過利用科學解釋作為先驗知識來支持結構化的科學思維和假設生成。這個管道幫助研究人員從現有文獻中推導出新穎的假設。給定研究論文的解釋對象（即結論），它識別潛在的法則、理論和原則，並重建一個尚未驗證的觀察現象的新解釋。我們在數據科學建模領域使用三篇被高度引用的論文評估了 DN-Hypo-Pipeline。統計推斷，通過 LLM 作為評判者的評估和人類專家的評估支持，顯示我們的管道比直接生成方法更有效。此外，我們通過開發相應的新算法驗證了兩個得分最高的生成假設，這些算法的表現超過了原始論文中提出的基準模型。除了在數據科學中的應用，DN-Hypo-Pipeline 提供了一個理論框架，不僅包含理論引導的數據科學建模方法，還揭示了建模過程的更基本結構。此外，這種方法本質上是理論引導建模的概括，為擴展到其他領域和更廣泛的科學學科提供了潛力。
2606.08532.author: Lei Lin et.al.
2606.08532.authors: Lei Lin, Ronghao Wang, Chunbao Zhou, Jue Wang, Yangang Wang
